name: 6 Pieces Hen Chicken Toys, Chicken Mirror Toy with Bells, Chicken Xylophone Toy with 8 Metal Keys, Parrot Grinding Stone, Sepak Takraw Toy, Dangling Bird Toy
description: Features: The xylophone is composed of 8 metal keys, and also contains a grindstone and chain for hanging. When your chicken pecks them, it will make a beautiful sound. Chickens are inherently aggressive, especially for roosters. Mirror toys let your rooster peck at himself in the mirror, making him feel less lonely and less bored. The chewing beak grindstone contains calcium, which is good for the health of pet hens during grinding.  specification: Chicken Xylophone: Size: 9.4 x 4.7 x 1.2 inches Material: wood Color: as shown Chicken mirror: Size: 3.9 x 3.9 inches Material: Pine wood Color: r
